Level-5 candy-monks — two distinct outlaw types

Same monk model, two tints = two enemy types. Warm orange = the Fireball monk, cool blue = the Star monk — readable at a glance in a crowd. Both attacks approved; just confirm the blue recolor + its motion read.
Orange Monk — Hadouken Candy-Fireball
Cups & conjures a swirling candy orb. The charged/heavy hitter.
Blue Monk — Candy-Star Throw
Quick cyan-star flick, sparkles trailing. The fast, light, multi-shot harasser.
